Preterit.turoyo: hedi mlele ʕebe ṭlawḥe w mġafele i=taḥolo, w nafəq b-u=tarʕo-da w azzé
translations:
He
			cautiously filled [his] pockets with lentils and taking advantage
			of aunt’s inattention passed the gate and left

Preterit.turoyo: Ya Moryo lo mġaflatli mu darbayḏux. Oh Lord! Do not allow me to forget your way. (İlyas p.c)

translations:
Lu
			qaṭolo mġafele aʕ ʕasekәr w mahzamle.The killer cheated the
			soldiers and escaped (İlyas p.c)

Preterit.turoyo: U ruʕyo mġafal mu qaṭʕo w u dewo qṭile aʕ ʕeze kulle. (İlyas p.c)
